content.en:
Terran.

Ye Tian came back again, this time he didn't recruit some Terran geniuses, he didn't need too many subordinates, and he didn't have the heart to spend a lot of resources to cultivate.

Not long after, he went to the Void Heaven Temple and let go of the power in his hands.

Previously, he had shown the strength of the Supreme True Ancestor, and many of the powers of the Void Heaven Hall had been handed over to him, and he had already become the leader and decision-maker of the Void Heaven True Realm.

But now, he has become a general of Black Wind Mountain, and his focus is on Black Wind Mountain, so naturally he can't continue to be in power in the Void Sky Vein.

Besides, he doesn't seem to worry too much about things.

So, Ye Tian handed over the power to the Shooting Moon True Ancestor, the Shooting Moon True Ancestor was originally an ancient True Ancestor of the Void Heaven lineage, plus the Shooting Moon True Ancestor's seniority and prestige were very high, so he was naturally suitable to continue to lead the Void Heaven Palace.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, it is more appropriate for you to manage the Void Heaven Palace!"

Moon Shooting True Ancestor persuaded.

"Moon Shooting True Ancestor, there are some things that are inconvenient to say, but I will no longer manage the affairs of the Void Heaven Temple in the future, unless the Void Heaven Temple is in danger, I will come to help. You just treat me as an idler!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

He didn't tell the Moon Shooting True Ancestor that he was from Black Wind Mountain, and the fewer people who knew about this matter, the better, otherwise there would be a little trouble in the future.

After being dissuaded many times to no avail, the Moon Shooting True Ancestor stopped persuading.

this day.

Ye Tian contacted his master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor again.

"Master, I have already given my rights to the Moon Shooting True Ancestor, and I will no longer manage the Void Heaven Hall in the future!" Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Oh, why?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was curious.

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and said directly: "The disciple has become a general of Black Wind Mountain, and General Black Wind Mountain belongs to the upper echelons of Black Wind Mountain, if he continues to be in charge of the Void Heaven Palace, it is not in line with General Black Wind Mountain's regulations." However, the disciple is also a disciple of the master no matter what, and he is the true disciple of the Void Heaven lineage!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not reprimand Ye Tian, but was very pleased.

He knew very well that it was difficult for the Void Heaven Pulse to cultivate Ye Tian to a higher level, and the Black Wind Mountain was very extraordinary, and he also knew a little that this was a powerful force that was at least comparable to the Seventh Heaven in the Upper Triple Heaven.

In the future, if the Void Sky is in trouble, he may need to ask for help from Black Wind Mountain and Ye Tian.

Therefore, he naturally would not prevent Ye Tian from becoming the general of Black Wind Mountain, he would only approve it with both hands!

"Disciple, you have already helped the Void Heaven Pulse a lot, if it weren't for you, the Void Heaven Pulse would not have been able to give birth to so many Dao Ancestors, nor would it be able to become the fifth great transcendent force!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

The two talked a lot more, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also told about the recent hunt for the Dark Temple.

Unfortunately, the headquarters of the Dark Temple is too deeply hidden and has not been found so far.

And most of the True Ancestors of the Dark God Temple are hidden in the Liuli Sect, and there is no movement at present.

After all, the Void Heaven True Kingdom was too weak, and it didn't dare to really enter the Liuli Sect, so it didn't deal with this matter.

After a while, Ye Tian disconnected from the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian occasionally instructed the geniuses of the Terran Terran Race in the Nine Extremes Space, dividing them into legions, known as the Nine Extremes Monarch Regiment.

On the other hand, he also occasionally retreats and cultivates, participating in Taoist techniques, cultivating the forbidden body, and cultivating the Nine Extremes True Technique......

In short, Ye Tian is very busy and has no leisure time.

The years passed slowly, and the Xuanxu Ancient Realm seemed to be very calm, and there were no major conflicts.

However, in the chaos of the Dao Mountain Realm, a big thing happened.

----------------

There is a forbidden place in the chaos of the Daoshan Realm, this is a very remote forbidden place, very close to the dark forbidden land, plus this forbidden place is very dangerous, and there are no chance treasures, so few strong people come here.

This forbidden place is known as the Forbidden Land of the Beast!

There are many terrifying beasts in the Beast Forbidden Land that have reached the True Ancestor level, and there are even Evil Beasts that are comparable to the Dao Ancestor level.

Of course, as long as you don't provoke the evil beasts, it's okay, the most dangerous thing in the forbidden land of the evil beasts is not the evil beasts, but the natural killing array and evil qi that permeate the entire forbidden land.

If you are not a true ancestor, you will be killed as soon as you enter the forbidden land, unless you use special treasures and take special pills.

And those natural killing formations were even more dangerous, and they could even threaten the life of Dao Ancestor.

In addition, this forbidden place is very large, and it will distort the sense of direction, and once you enter, it is easy to get lost, so you can't get out.

So, this forbidden place is terrifying.

However, today a Dao Ancestor came to the Forbidden Land of Evil Beasts.

"This is the Forbidden Land of Evil Beasts, great, there must be all kinds of powerful evil qi here, I created my own Nine Evil Spirits, and I need nine powerful evil qi as the foundation, and the evil qi in other places is too weak, far inferior to the evil qi of the Forbidden Land of Evil Beasts. With the strength of my Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, I shouldn't encounter any danger!"

The Underworld Dao Ancestor muttered.

As a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, he was almost already the top combat power of the Dao Mountain Realm, and he didn't think that a single forbidden land could threaten him.

Moreover, he had only heard that a Dao Ancestor of the First and Second Heavens had fallen in the Forbidden Land of the Evil Beasts, but he had never heard of a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor falling here.

Therefore, this Beast Forbidden Land can threaten one or two Heavenly Dao Ancestors at most!

Wow!

The Evil Dao Ancestor flew into the Forbidden Land of the Evil Beasts, looking for the evil qi he wanted.

Along the way, he encountered several evil beasts, but they were all relatively weak, just comparable to the true ancestor, and he easily killed them.

I don't know how far he flew, the Evil Dao Ancestor suddenly sensed a special aura, and he quickly shuttled along this aura to the core area of the Evil Beast Forbidden Land.

Suddenly.

The Demonic Dao Ancestor saw a huge creature corpse that occupied a sizable area of the core area of the Demonic Beast Forbidden Land.

It crawls here like a continent, but unfortunately it is lifeless, just a corpse.

If it had been before, the Underworld Dao Ancestor might not have known this creature.

But now, many inheritances, knowledge, and various secrets of the Divine Heaven Realm have been passed down to the Dao Mountain Realm one by one, and they are also well known to these Dao Ancestors.

Therefore, the Underworld Dao Ancestor recognized it at a glance.

"Boundary Beast!"

The Underworld Dao Ancestor was excited.

This is a realm beast, although it looks a little small, it should be a juvenile realm beast, and it is also a realm beast.

If it is an adult living realm beast, its strength is even stronger than him, and it is not a good thing to encounter it.

And even if the value of a dead realm beast is weakened by ninety-nine percent, it is an unimaginable value to him!

"It's gone! I've come across a dead realm beast, and if I sell it, I'm afraid it will sell it for a lot of money!"

Perhaps, he could also use this opportunity to cultivate to the realm of the Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor or even the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

He believed that those realm forces would be willing to pay a lot of money for the corpse of his realm beast.

As a result, the Underworld Dao Ancestor flew towards the Realm Beast.

Suddenly.

He felt a large array cover the place, and the great array opened.

At the same time, a powerful aura was exposed.

Rumble!!!!!

A top-tier Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor's aura locked onto him.

Seeing the person coming, the Immortal Dao Ancestor was frightened.

"It's you, Dark Temple Master......!

The Underworld Dao Ancestor completely understood.

This is the headquarters of the Dark Temple, and the headquarters of the Dark Temple is actually in the inner world of a dead beast, no wonder people have not been able to find the headquarters of the Dark Temple, and they can't even deduce it.

Who can deduce the beasts?

A creature like a realm beast, even if it dies, it is a creature that almost jumps out of the rules of the realm!

"Run!"

The Evil Dao Ancestor immediately made a decision and fled quickly.

He knew very well that the Dark Temple would never let him go, and would definitely keep him at all costs, otherwise the headquarters of the Dark Temple would be exposed.

And the Dark God Temple Lord is a top-tier Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is just an ordinary Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

In terms of strength, he is not an opponent.

"Evil Dao Ancestor, you can't run!"

The Lord of the Dark Temple pursued and killed.

At the same time, the Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor who was located in several other strongholds in the Demon Beast Territory also quickly killed from all directions, wanting to stop the Evil Dao Ancestor.

Although the Dao Ancestors of the Dark Temple were killed a lot by the Void Heaven One Vein, there were at least a dozen of them, and now they were all dispatched, and they all intercepted and killed the Dao Ancestors.

Thundered!!!!

In the forbidden land of evil beasts, the battle is fighting.

The Underworld Dao Ancestor didn't have the slightest intention of fighting, just to escape, and even if those First and Second Heavenly Dao Ancestors attacked him, he wouldn't fight back.

Soon, the Dark Temple Master also chased after him.
